title: erica calycina var. calycina
intro: Erica calycina var. calycina, also known as Red-heather, is a variety of flowering plant in the heath family (Ericaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are said to aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Erica calycina var. calycina include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
